docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF APPAREL DORMAN, LLC SERVED NOV-17-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TSAR NICOULAI CAVIAR, LLC
